name: Coronary Heart Disease (CHD)
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with coronary heart disease (CHD) based on the eMERGE Network algorithm. The phenotype requires either two occurrences of diagnostic codes OR one occurrence of a procedural code for CHD/coronary artery disease. This is a complex phenotype that requires tracking multiple occurrences of diagnostic codes and single occurrences of procedural codes.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of coronary heart disease or coronary artery disease, including those who have had coronary interventions or procedures.

required_codes.display: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery without angina pectoris
Other specified forms of chronic ischemic heart disease
Coronary atherosclerosis of unspecified type of vessel, native or graft
Acute myocardial infarction of unspecified site
